title: Quality Control Accessor / Senior Automotive Technician
description:
• Well Established Company

  • Basic $2,400 - $3,000 + Variable Bonus

  • Working location: Ubi

  • Working days: 5.5 days (alternate Saturday)

  • Working hours: 8.30am - 6.00pm / 8.30am - 12.30pm



Key Responsibilities

  • Assist the Workshop Supervisor in the daily operations of the workshop

  • Perform advanced diagnostics and troubleshooting on vehicles

  • Ensure all repair and service work complies with Audi standards and quality requirements

  • Conduct final inspections and completion checks on all service and repair jobs

  • Work closely with the Foreman on detailed investigations and final quality assessments

  • Provide technical support, product knowledge, and repair guidance to technicians

  • Identify and report additional repair requirements promptly to the Foreman

  • Support Foreman and Service Advisors during test drives and service-related matters

  • Provide technical assistance and mentorship to workshop technicians

  • Perform other duties as assigned



Requirements

  • Minimum 3 years of experience as a QC Accessor or similar role in an automotive workshop

  • Relevant vocational certification or qualification in automotive repair will be a plus

  • Valid Class 3 driving license



 Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities

  • Current and Expected salary

  • Reason for leaving

  • Date of availability

  • Education background

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



NG JYA YEE (R23119014)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
